name: APICAL PETROSITIS
definition: PETROUS APICITIS = PETROSITIS infectious process caused by medial extension of acute otitis media into pneumatized petrous

demographics.Etiology: spread from middle ear + mastoid infection; requires presence of air cells in petrous

discriminating_features: opacification of aerated petrous apex + air-fluid levels
fluid in ipsilateral middle ear + mastoid
hyperintense signal on T2WI + hypointense on T1WI
avidly enhancing mass in pneumatized petrous apex

general: opacification of aerated petrous apex + air-fluid levels
fluid in ipsilateral middle ear + mastoid
MR: hyperintense signal on T2WI + hypointense on T1WI
avidly enhancing mass in pneumatized petrous apex

clinical.Cx: meningitis; epidural / brain abscess (ring enhancement, restricted DWI); venous sinus
